duplicates.title: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Urgent Dental Surgery Signals Healthcare Consumer Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency dental surgery signals healthcare consumer stress

idea.title: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Urgent Dental Surgery Signals Healthcare Consumer Stress
idea.thesis: Spikes in urgent dental surgery searches indicate rising consumer health stress and urgent care demand. Healthcare sector benefits from increased urgent care service demand driven by consumer stress.
idea.signal_logic: If daily Google Trends for 'urgent dental surgery' rises 50% vs 7-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If daily Google Trends for 'urgent dental surgery' rises 50% vs 7-day average Exit: After 5 trading days or if trend drops below +20% baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Healthcare urgent care search spikes are common during flu seasons and acute illness outbreaks.

schema.idea: Daily surge in Google Trends for 'urgent dental surgery' signals healthcare consumer stress
schema.behavior: Spikes in urgent dental surgery searches indicate rising consumer health stress and urgent care demand.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare sector benefits from increased urgent care service demand driven by consumer stress.

trade_logic.entry: If daily Google Trends for 'urgent dental surgery' rises 50% vs 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or if trend drops below +20% baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Healthcare urgent care search spikes are common during flu seasons and acute illness outbreaks.

duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Urgent Hvac Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Discretionary Home Services

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Urgent Hvac Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Discretionary Home Services
idea.thesis: Urgent HVAC repair searches spike when consumers face unexpected home stress, boosting discretionary services. Home services and consumer discretionary benefit from stress-driven urgent repairs.
idea.signal_logic: If daily Google Trends for 'urgent HVAC repair' rises 45% vs 7-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If daily Google Trends for 'urgent HVAC repair' rises 45% vs 7-day average Exit: After 7 trading days or if trend declines below +20% baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: HVAC failures and urgent repair searches spike seasonally and during heat waves or cold snaps.

schema.idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'urgent HVAC repair' signals consumer stress lifting discretionary home services
schema.behavior: Urgent HVAC repair searches spike when consumers face unexpected home stress, boosting discretionary services.

market_impact.rationale: Home services and consumer discretionary benefit from stress-driven urgent repairs.

trade_logic.entry: If daily Google Trends for 'urgent HVAC repair' rises 45% vs 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if trend declines below +20% baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: HVAC failures and urgent repair searches spike seasonally and during heat waves or cold snaps.
